description:
An occupational health evaluation has concluded that patient John Zenon has bilateral sensorineural hearing loss due to industrial noise exposure. Log into GNU Health (username: admin, password: gnusolidario). Navigate to John Zenon's patient record, and add a new disease/condition entry in the 'Diseases' section with the following details:
- Disease/Pathology: Noise effects on inner ear (Search for ICD-10 code: H83.3)
- Diagnosed Date: 2025-01-15
- Status: Active
- Extra Info / Notes: 'Bilateral sensorineural hearing loss due to prolonged exposure to industrial noise exceeding 85 dB. Recommend hearing protection.'
Save the record when complete.
